headlines.title: Microsoft’s reset, a new era for Seattle startups, and how AI is changing everything for founders
Apple's stock is up 15% since June 25, adding nearly $600B in market value and pushing shares back to record territory, as investors flee an AI stock selloff (Ryan Vlastelica/Bloomberg)
Source: OpenAI still believes it is on track to unveil its first device in 2026 and release it in 2027; Apple's lawsuit may complicate hiring and supply chains (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)
Anthropic hires Tom Blomfield, a Monzo co-founder and one of the biggest names in UK tech, to join its compute team; he is taking a leave of absence from YC (Robert Scammell/Business Insider)
Anthropic recruits Monzo cofounder Tom Blomfield for AI compute team
Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
Migrating a production AI agent to GPT-5.6: 2.2x faster, 27% cheaper
Yann LeCun’s new VC fund lasted eight hours. Then it vanished
Nearly 200 economists, including 15 Nobel laureates and Anthropic's Jack Clark, sign a letter titled We Must Act Now, warning of rapid AI-led job displacement (Ben Casselman/New York Times)
Welcome To The ‘Show Me’ Era: Sapphire Ventures’ Anders Ranum On What Separates Winning AI Startups From The Rest
Augmodo raises $21M to push its spatial AI beyond just retail toward the broader physical workforce
Helsing raises $1.8bn backed by Goldman and Lightspeed
Raxio raises its funding pool to $380m and heads for Tanzania
South Korea flags a record $530bn budget, paid for by the AI chip boom
TCS bets on 8,900 AI deployment engineers to defend India’s IT services model
Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
Etzioni on AI: Who disagrees with you about AI? Here’s what the research shows
LARP – Revenue infrastructure for serious founders
Sources: US officials estimate unauthorized distillation costs US AI labs up to $6B/year; Silicon Valley told the Trump admin it could be an existential threat (Maggie Eastland/Bloomberg)
Never-skilling: the research says juniors using AI never learn to debug
Intel plans to invest €5B to expand chip manufacturing at its Leixlip facility in Ireland; in 2025, Intel canceled a planned €30B factory in Magdeburg, Germany (Financial Times)
Meta says it will spend an extra $40B on its nearly 4,000-acre data center campus in Louisiana, aiming for 5GW+ of compute, pushing its total spend beyond $250B (Riley Griffin/Bloomberg)
Moneybox crowned Europe’s newest unicorn as it gears up to test London’s Pisces market
China says President Xi will deliver a keynote speech at the opening ceremony of the three-day World AI Conference in Shanghai on Friday, his first appearance (Bloomberg)
